subcodes.first_line: This is Our mention of her who hath turned towards the Qiblih of the world and hath quaffed the choice wine of grace from the hands of the favors of her Lord, the Mighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدنا للتی اقبلت الی قبله العالم و شربت رحیق الفضل من ایادی الطاف ربها العزیز
